cases.name: stdout redirection: redirect stdout to file and read back
stdout redirection: append to file
cases.script: F=/tmp/test_append.txt; echo first > $F; echo second >> $F; cat $F; rm $F

cases.name: stdout redirection: multiple appends
cases.script: F=/tmp/test_multi.txt; echo line_a > $F; echo line_b >> $F; echo line_c >> $F; cat $F; rm $F

cases.name: stderr redirection: redirect stderr to dev null
stderr redirection: stderr to stdout with 2>&1
cases.script: echo stdout; cat /nonexistent_xyz_file 2>&1 | grep -c xyz || true

cases.name: combined redirections: redirect both stdout and stderr with &>
combined redirections: stderr to stdout then pipe
cases.script: { echo line1; echo line2 >&2; } 2>&1 | wc -l | tr -d ' '

cases.name: heredoc: heredoc no expansion with single quotes
input redirection: redirect stdin from file
input redirection: redirect stdin in pipeline
cases.script: F=/tmp/test_in2.txt; echo 'a b c' > $F; wc -w < $F; rm $F

cases.name: file descriptor manipulation: duplicate file descriptor
